data.name: Towel
data.description: A towel is a piece of absorbent cloth, or paper, used for drying or wiping a surface. Towels draw moisture through direct contact

subcategories.name: Bath Towel
subcategories.description: Bath towels are designed to absorb moisture from the skin efficiently after a shower or bath. They come in various sizes and materials to suit different preferences, from soft and plush for a luxurious feel to quick-drying fabrics for convenience.

subcategories.name: Kitchen Towel
subcategories.description: Kitchen towels are versatile, highly absorbent, and durable linens or non-woven fabrics designed for drying dishes, hands, and cleaning kitchen surfaces

data.name: Hand Kerchief
data.description: a small, usually square piece of fabric or paper designed to be carried in a pocket or handbag. It is used for personal hygiene purposes, such as wiping the nose, face, or eyes

subcategories.name: Men handkerchief
subcategories.description: a small, usually square piece of fabric or paper designed to be carried in a pocket or handbag. It is used for personal hygiene purposes, such as wiping the nose, face, or eyes

subcategories.name: Women handkerchief
subcategories.description: a small, usually square piece of fabric or paper designed to be carried in a pocket or handbag. It is used for personal hygiene purposes, such as wiping the nose, face, or eyes

data.name: Apron
data.description: An apron is a protective garment worn over the front of the body to shield clothing from stains, spills, and damage during activities like cooking, cleaning, or working.

subcategories.name: Kitchen Apron
subcategories.description: A kitchen apron is a protective garment worn over clothing, designed to shield against spills, stains, and splatters while cooking or baking.

subcategories.name: Baking Apron
subcategories.description: A baking apron is a protective, typically cotton or polyester blend garment designed to shield clothing from flour, spills, and stains. Featuring adjustable neck and waist straps for a secure fit, these durable, often machine-washable aprons include front pockets for holding utensils, recipes, or towels, making them ideal for messy kitchen tasks.
